PreferenceCategory.android:title: Newsstand debug options - IMMEDIATE application of settings

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Show clickable content
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Show clickable content in Newsstand, links and text

PreferenceCategory.android:title: Newsstand debug options - RESTART ONLY application of settings

Preference.android:title: Clear bookmarks
Preference.android:summary: Click to clear Newsstand bookmarks saved in DB (does not delete those in memory, not yet saved - ie current open Newsstand)

EditTextPreference.android:title: Tap tutorial - number of instances
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Number of times the tutorial will be displayed (negative values will not change the Newsstand value)
EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage: Input the new number of instances to use

Preference.android:title: Apply TapToTextTutorial Value
Preference.android:summary: Save value to the newsstand database (only works when the app is opened)

PreferenceCategory.android:title: ThumbnailGridView settings - applied after orientation change

ListPreference.android:title: Force all magazines to be upsell

EditTextPreference.android:title: Frequency of full sync in MS
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Frequency of full sync in MS (negative values will not change the Newsstand value)

Preference.android:title: Unregister any sync alarms
Preference.android:summary: Unregister any sync alarms. You will need to kill application to register default scheduling again.

Preference.android:title: Sync the upsell data from device
Preference.android:summary: Sync the upsell data from sample json present in the device locally. Push the json file(name=upsell_http_response.json) in the /sdcard/

Preference.android:title: Sync the cover data for magazines on the device

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable YJ Replica content
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable YJ Replica content for magazines
